extraction.one_line_summary: BILBAO Peli Javi won from 8-rider breakaway by attacking with 1900m to go on uphill finish in L'Aquila, exploiting hesitation among chasers
tactical_patterns: Astana placed two riders (Bilbao/Pedraza) in break; Pedraza's hard pulling preserved energy for Bilbao's winning move late
Bilbao attacked at 1900m on uphill finish forcing chasers to hesitate organizing pursuit, creating decisive gap
De Plus abandoned after being in previous day's breakaway, revealing cost of consecutive breakaway efforts on domestiques

rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: negative: Abandoned after hard work in Stage 6 breakaway, leaving Roglic without key mountain domestique
rider_signals.BILBAO Peli Javi: positive: Given GC freedom despite climbing ability because team improvised when Dario couldn't make break
rider_signals.ROJAS Jose Joaquin: positive: Gained over 1 minute on GC rivals despite two consecutive days in breakaway
